summary: Margin Trading and Unified Wallet features fully tested. 19/19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend components verified: professional candlestick charts with lightweight-charts, chart type switching (Candlestick/Line/Area/Bar), interval switching (1m/5m/15m/1H/4H/1D), technical indicators (SMA 20/50/200, EMA 12/26/50, RSI 14, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Volume), pair selector, LONG/SHORT buttons, leverage selector (2x-20x), margin account panel, positions table. Unified Wallet tab shows internal + on-chain balances synced. Token Discovery button present on On-Chain tab.
critical_code_review_comments: Margin Trading uses lightweight-charts v4.2.0 for professional candlestick charts
Technical indicators calculated client-side: SMA, EMA, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands
Volume indicator shows colored bars (green/red based on candle direction)
Oscillator panel renders RSI and MACD in separate sub-charts
Margin account correctly shows balance, equity, PnL, margin level
Position opening calculates notional value and required margin correctly
Unified Wallet aggregates internal platform balances + on-chain balances
Token Discovery endpoint works for discovering ERC-20/BEP-20 tokens
All UI labels in Italian as requested (Posizioni, Storico, Deposita, Preleva, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Margin account created for test user during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Margin Trading feature fully implemented at /margin route. Uses lightweight-charts for professional candlestick charts. Supports 8 trading pairs (BTC-EUR, ETH-EUR, etc.), 6 intervals, 4 chart types, 10 technical indicators. Margin account requires deposit before opening positions. Unified Wallet at /wallet shows combined internal + on-chain balances. Token Discovery available on On-Chain tab.

mocked_apis.candle_data: Generated from trades or simulated if insufficient trade history
mocked_apis.margin_positions: Real margin trading with simulated price feeds
